rationale: Preprocess text likely already contains the lineup count, so retrieve the relevant ASR/preprocess span before planning new tool use.

requests.need: The explicit lineup/list of comedians featured in the show and enough surrounding text to count them reliably
requests.query: line-up lovely we have Nicky Bedi Daniel Taylor Aziz Abraham Christiana Backer Inder Manocha Dave Cohen and me comedians featured show

requests.need: Any preprocess summary or caption text that states how many comedians/panelists are featured in the show
requests.query: comedians featured in the show lineup panelists performers immigrant diaries
